scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.start:fullstack: npm run build && npm --prefix backend run start
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm --prefix backend exec prisma migrate dev --name init
